verses.text: Tua ciangin Abijah si a, David khuapi sungah kivui hi. Tua ciangin ama tangin a tapa Asa in uk hi. Asa hun sungin tua gamah kum sawm sung gal dai hi
Tua ciangin Asa in ama Pasian, Topa' mitah a hoih leh a man na sem hi
Amah in gamdang biakna taute leh mual dawna biakpiakna munte lakhia-in, biakna songte supai-in Asherah milimte phuk a
amau' pute pate' Pasian, Topa zongin thukham leh thupiaknate a zuihna dingun Judah mite thu a pia hi
Amah in Judah khuapi khempeuh panin mual dawna biakpiakna munte leh paknamtui biakna taute zong lakhia hi. Tua ciangin ama khutnuai-ah kumpi gamsung gal dai hi
Tua gamah gal dai ahih manin Judah gam sungah kulh a nei khuapite a lam hi. Topa in ama tungah galdaihna hun pia ahih manin tua hun sungin amah in galdona neilo hi

Tua ciangin amah in Judah mite kiangah, “Hih khuapite lamin kulhpite leh tausangte, kulhkongpite leh zawlte tawh um ni. Eite in Topa i Pasian zong ihih manin leitang pen eima-a' hi lai hi. Eite in amah i zong a, amah in i kiim khempeuh panin galdaihna hong pia hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin amaute in khuapite lamin kulh tawh um uh a, mavang uh hi

Asa in Judah mite sung panin lumneu leh teipi a tawi galkap tul za thum, leh Benjamin mite lum pua-in thal a keek tul za nih leh tul sawmgiat nei hi. Hih mite khempeuh pen a thahat a galhang mite vive ahi uh hi
Amaute a sim dingin Ethiopia mi Zerah, galkap awn khat leh leeng galkap za thum tawh hong kuankhia a, Mareshah ciangdong hong tung hi
Tua ciangin amah a dawntuah dingin Asa kuankhia a, Zefathah leh Mareshah kuamah galdona ding pan'na a bawl uh hi

Tua ciangin Topa Pasian' tungah Asa kiko a, “ Topa aw, a thahat leh a zawngkhal a kidona-ah a huh dingin nang tawh a kibang kuamah dang omlo hi. Kote hong huh in, Topa kote' Pasian aw; bang hang hiam cih leh nang kong suang uh a, nangma minin hih mihonpi a do dingin kong pai uh hi. Topa aw, nang, kote' Pasian na hi hi; mite kizosak kei in,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Topa in Asa leh Judah mite' mai-ah Ethiopia mite zo a, Ethiopia mite tai uh hi

Asa leh amah tawh a om mite in Gerar ciangdong amaute delh uh a, a hing kuamah a om nawnloh dongin Ethiopia mite puk uh hi; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa leh ama galkapte' mai-ah amaute kisusia hi. Judah mite in vankinusia tampi tak pua uh hi
Topa a kikihtakna amaute tungah om ahih manin amaute in Gerar kiima khuapi khempeuh vat uh hi. Amaute in khuapite luh uh a, tuate sungah vankinusiate tam mahmah hi
Tua ciangin amaute in gan omna puanbukte vat uh a, tuu tampi leh kalaohte paikhiatpih uh hi. Tua ciangin Jerusalem-ah a ciahkik uh hi.
